Maternal, Child, and Family Health Services (MCFHS)
Statistics
Statistics
Maternal, Child and Family Health Services (MCFHS) analyzes,
 monitors, and disseminates statistics on perinatal health issues.  If
 you have any questions regarding MCFHS statistics, please call
 619-904-2153 or send us an
email
.  If you are pregnant and need services,
 call 2-1-1 or 1-800-675-2229.
Facilities where this Service is Offered:
This is currently being determined. Please call the number
 listed for more details
Statistical Tables and Graphs
MCFHS provides the following statistical tables and graphs on
 selected perinatal health indicators. They include only San Diego
 County residents. Note that past years' statistics may be revised as
 methods change or updated data become available.
